import { spec, specId } from "@libar-dev/software-delivery-protocol";

// The duplicate-property guard at the section tier: the repeat drops with a warning and the
// first authored value survives — never a silent last-wins (tsc reports TS1117 to typechecking
// authors; the extractor reads files standalone, so it is the backstop at every object tier).
export const nestedDuplicate = spec({
  id: specId("spec:orders.nested-duplicate"),
  title: "Duplicate property inside section content",
  kind: "behavior",
  altitude: "feature",
  readiness: "idea",
  intent: { outcome: "first authored value", outcome: "silent last-wins would take this" },
});
